title: [Warning] Warning: ADCADA Investments AG PCC and ADCADA International AG
text: The Liechtenstein Financial Market Authority (FMA) points out that ADCADA Investments AG PCC, Ruggell, registration number FL-0002.600.340-0, and ADCADA International AG, Ruggell, registration number FL-0002.600.350-5, have not been licensed by the FMA.   Especially, ADCADA Investments AG PCC and ADCADA International AG are not allowed to accept deposits in connection with the “adcada.money Hypozins“ as advertised on the website adcada[dot]money.
